asset.title: L5 Large Range
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: The workflow preview clearly demonstrates a 5-row window locking and CAS write protocol. It is highly legible, well-structured, and effectively communicates concurrency control concepts.

featureClarity.evidence: Demonstrates row-level locking and CAS versioned writes on a specific range.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the full sequence from locking, reading, writing with CAS, to releasing the lock.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-themed layout with clear visual cues for state changes.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with the spreadsheet-like versioning and agent execution model.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Presents a clean, simulated trace replay of the row-locking mechanism.

legibility.evidence: High-contrast text and clear step-by-step captions at the bottom.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for developers evaluating concurrency and data integrity features.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately represents the step-by-step protocol flow without overclaiming.

observedEvidence: CAS write demonstration with version increment
Clear status indicators for locked and committed states
judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Visual trace of the L5 Large Range workflow showing row-level locking and CAS-based versioned updates.
